Document:
# Roleplay Rule 2 - Don't over-esalate
Don't over-escalate. Someone calling you stinky is not a good enough reason for you to kill them.
## Precedents
- Insults are not just reason for murder. But you can insult them back, or even beat them up depending on the intensity of the insult. - Respond with roughly equivelent force, if only a bit stronger. If you get called stinky, you could shove them. If someone shoves you, you could punch them back. If someone stabbed you, you could shoot them back. - Extreme in-character insults like speciesism allow you to skip straight to beating their ass. - Don't kill people or leave them to die. You should stop fighting as soon as someone is crit. Killing people is self-antagging.
